name: libb-hooks-endofscope-perl
title: libb-hooks-endofscope-perl
summary: module for executing code after a scope finished compilation
description:
module for executing code after a scope finished compilation
B::Hooks::EndOfScope allows you to execute code when perl finished
compiling the surrounding scope. It exports a single function,
'on_scope_end $codeblock', which can be used e.g. for introspection in
the constructor of your class.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libb-hooks-endofscope-perl because module for executing code after a scope finished compilation.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libb-hooks-endofscope-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libb-hooks-endofscope-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libb-hooks-endofscope-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
